keynotes.text: A SYNOPTIC KEY OF THE MATERIA MEDICA By Cyrus Maxwell BOGER Presented by Médi-T REPERTORY LOWER LIMBS. Lower limbs : Alu., Ars., Bell., Calc-c., Caust., Grap., Kali-c., Lach., Led., Lyc., Merc., Nit-ac., Nux-v., Pul., Rhus-t., Sep., Sil., Sul., Val., Zin. Lower limbs, right : Ars., Bell., Bry., Coloc., Grap., Lach., Nux-v., Pho., Pul., Rhod., Sars., Sec-c., Sep. Lower limbs, left : Amb., Asaf., Calc-c., Cina., Con., Fer., Hep., Lyc., Nit-ac., Rhus-t., Sil., Stram., Sul. Lower limbs, alternating between : Aco., Alo., Ars., Bry., Calc-p., Cham., Cic., Coloc., Cup., Dios., Grap., Kali-bi., Kali-c., Kali-n., Lach., Lil-t., Mag-p., Nat-m., Nat-s., Pul., Rhus-t., Sep., Sil., Sul. Lower limbs, hips and loins : Arn., Caust., Euphorb., Lyc., Phyt., Rhus-t., Rut., Sep., Sul. Lower limbs, hips, alternating between : Euon. Lower limbs, hips, motion, agg. : Ant-t. Lower limbs, hips, motion, amel. : Am-m., Calc-c., Iris. Lower limbs, hips, rising, agg. : Nat-s. Lower limbs, buttocks : Grap., Pho-ac., Stap., Sul. Lower limbs, buttocks, red : Carb-v., Cham., Sul. Lower limbs, thighs : Ars., Chin., Clem., Guai., Merc., Nat-m., Phyt., Sep. Lower limbs, thighs, anterior : Anac., Spo., Xantx. Lower limbs, thighs, posterior and sciatic nerve : Coloc., Gnap., Rhus-t., Sul., Zin. Lower limbs, thighs, outer side : Caust., Helo., Pho-ac., Phyt. Lower limbs, thighs, inner side : Petr., Rhod., Stan., Sul. Lower limbs, legs : Am-c., Calc-c., Lyc., Pul., Sep., Sil., Stap. Lower limbs, legs, numb, right : Ced., Eup-p., Kali-c., Nux-m., Zin. Lower limbs, legs, restless : Ars., Kali-c., Nit-ac., Rhus-t., Sul., Zin. Lower limbs, tibia , shin : Agar., Asaf., Calc-c., Carb-v., Lach., Merc., Mez., Pho., Phyt., Pul., Stil. Lower limbs, calf : Alu., Arg-n., Ars., Calc-c., Grap., Ign., Nit-ac., Nux-v., Pul., Sep., Stan., Stap., Sul., Val. Lower limbs, calf, cramp in : Calc-c., Cham., Cup., Ign., Lyc., Nux-v., Sec-c., Sep., Sul. Lower limbs, tendo Achilles : Anac., Kali-bi., Mur-ac., Sep., Val., Zin. Lower limbs, foot : Arn., Ars., Bell., Bry., Caust., Kali-c., Lyc., Pul., Sep., Sil., Zin. Lower limbs, foot, edge : Zin. Lower limbs, foot, bones : Chin., Cup., Led., Mez., Rut., Stap. Lower limbs, foot, border of : Grap., Led., Lith-c. Lower limbs, foot, cold, agg. : Bar-c., Con., Lach., Nux-v., Pul., Sil. Lower limbs, foot, cold, wet, agg. : Pul. Lower limbs, foot, coldness of one : Bar-c., Carb-v., Chel., Con., Lyc., Psor., Pul., Rhus-t., Sabi., Sul., Tub. Lower limbs, foot, coldness of one, left : Carb-v., Psor., Rhus-t., Sul., Tub. Lower limbs, foot, coldness of one, right : Bar-c., Lyc., Pul., Sabi. Lower limbs, foot, damp : Calc-c. Lower limbs, foot, heavy : Alu., Ars., Cycl., Nat-m., Pul., Sul. Lower limbs, foot, motion, amel. : Zin. Lower limbs, foot, numb : Ars., Cocc., Nux-v., Plat., Sep. Lower limbs, foot, numb, right : Alu., Ant-c., Ars., Cam., Kali-bi., Mang., Rhus-t. Lower limbs, foot, numb, left : Grap., Kali-c., Med., Nat-m., Pho., Psor., Thu. Lower limbs, foot, sweating : Bar-c., Calc-c., Carb-v., Iod., Lyc., Pul., Sep., Sil., Sul., Thu. Lower limbs, foot, sweating, foul odor : Bar-c., Kali-c., Nit-ac., Pul., Sil., Thu. Lower limbs, foot, swelling, right : Bov., Lac-c., Lach., Lyc., Sars., Sec-c., Spir., Spo., Stro., Sul. Lower limbs, foot, swelling, left : Ap., Coloc., Com., Kre., Lyc., Sang., Sil., Tell. Lower limbs, foot, heels : Calc-c., Caust., Grap., Ign., Led., Mang., Nat-c., Pul., Sabi., Sep. Lower limbs, foot, dorsum : Calc-c., Caust., Hep., Pul., Spig., Tarx. Lower limbs, foot, soles : Cup., Pho-ac., Pul., Tarx. Lower limbs, foot, soles, burn : Calc-c., Lach., Lyc., Sang., Sul. Lower limbs, foot, soles, callosities : Ant-c., Ars., Bar-c., Grap., Sep., Sil., Sul. Lower limbs, foot, soles, painful : Kali-c., Lyc., Med., Pul. Lower limbs, foot, soles, soft, furry [[as if]] : Alu., Ars., Cann., Cocc., Helo., Xantx., Zin. Lower limbs, foot, swelled : Fer., Lyc., Pul. Lower limbs, foot, toes : Arn., Caust., Grap., Plat., Pul., Ran-sc., Sabi., Sul., Thu. Lower limbs, foot, toes, great : Ars., Asaf., Caust., Kali-c., Nat-s., Plat., Sabi., Sil., Zin. Lower limbs, foot, toes, great, podagra : Sabi. Lower limbs, foot, toes, tips : Kali-c. Lower limbs, foot, toes, balls of : Led., Petr., Pul., Spig. Lower limbs, foot, toes, nails : Grap., Saba. Lower limbs, foot, toes, corns : Ant-c., Bry., Calc-c., Ign., Lyc., Rhus-t., Sep., Sil., Sul. Lower limbs, foot, toes, corn, soft : Sil. Lower limbs, foot, toes, inflamed : Sil. Lower limbs, foot, touch, agg. : Ars., Calc-c., Chin., Kali-c., Sep., Sul. Lower limbs, foot, uncover, must : Flu-ac., Sul. Lower limbs, joints : Bry., Calc-c., Caust., Kali-c., Led., Lyc., Nat-m., Rhus-t., Sep., Sil., Stro., Sul. Lower limbs, joints, hip : Bry., Caust., Led., Merc., Pho-ac., Rhus-t., Stram., Thu. Lower limbs, joints, hip, motion, agg. : Ant-t. Lower limbs, joints, hip, motion, amel. : Am-m., Calc-f., Iris. Lower limbs, joints, hip, rising, agg. : Nat-s. Lower limbs, joints, knee : Ap., Aur., Benz-ac., Caust., Chin., Gels., Led., Nat-m., Nux-v., Petr., Pul., Rhus-t., Sep., Sul. Lower limbs, joints, knee, tubercular : Calc-c., Iod., Lyc., Sul. Lower limbs, joints, knee, weak : Cocc., Gels., Sep. Lower limbs, joints, popliteal space : Bell., Nat-m., Pho. Lower limbs, joints, patella : Bell., Con. Lower limbs, joints, ankles : Caust., Led., Lyc., Nat-m., Rhus-t., Sep., Sul. Lower limbs, joints, ankles, sprain : Led. Lower limbs, joints, ankles, weak : Nat-c. Lower limbs, joints, toe-joints : Aur., Caust., Kali-c., Led., Mar-v., Sabi., Sep., Sul., Zin. Lower limbs, bones : Merc., Pho., Pul., Rut., Sil., Stap. Lower limbs, bathing, cool , amel. : Aur., Led. Lower limbs, crossing limbs , agg. : Rhus-t. Lower limbs, crossing limbs, amel. : Ant-t., Lil-t., Murx., Rhod., Sep., Thu. Lower limbs, down to feet , pain : Alu., Caps., Lyc., Rhus-t. Lower limbs, elevating limbs , amel. : Calc-c., Carb-v., Pul., Ran-sc., Sep., Vip. Lower limbs, inversion : Cic., Merc., Nux-v., Petr., Psor., Sec-c. Lower limbs, jerking up : Lach., Lyc., Mygl. Lower limbs, phlegmasia dolens : Ap., Calc-c., Lach., Pul., Vip. Lower limbs, sciatica : Ars., Coloc., Dios., Ign., Kali-bi., Nux-v., Rhus-t., Rut., Tell. Lower limbs, weakness , paralysis, etc. : Ars., Gels., Nat-m., Nux-v., Sep., Sul. Copyright © Médi-T 1999
